capex_mentions.quote: acquisition of Kudu Dynamics for a final purchase consideration of $293 million, net of $29 million of cash acquired
capex_mentions.context: Acquisition of AI-enabled cyber capabilities company, May 2025

limitations: No explicit multi-year AI capex budget or dedicated AI spend figures disclosed; investment intensity scored 3 based on named AI infrastructure/acquisition rather than quantified AI-specific capex program.

Narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (national security software, multi-domain solutions) but no quantified business results (e.g., % efficiency gains, revenue attributable to AI) were found in excerpts.
The $293M Kudu Dynamics acquisition is the only dollar figure tied to AI investment; it is an M&A transaction rather than organic capex, so capex_mentions reflects this with appropriate context.
Risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific (scored 4) but no quantified risk metrics or named governance oversight bodies were found to justify a score of 5.
